mainEntity.name: Free ways to improve AI referrals for Houston small firms?
mainEntity.text: Free ways to improve AI referrals for Houston small firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Claim/update Avvo/Justia profiles, add FAQ schema, solicit Google reviews, join local bar directories—all free for Houston small firms.[3][2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Prioritize consistency across free dirs. Write 10 FAQs with schema. Encourage 5 reviews/month. Houston Bar free listings. No cost, high ROI. Time-intensive; track progress. Larger firms outpace without scale.[3]

name: Free AI Referral Tactics for Houston Small Firms
description: Claim/update Avvo/Justia profiles, add FAQ schema, solicit Google reviews, join local bar directories—all free for Houston small firms.[3][2]
